title: RTK hook config
outcome: RTK wired as a profile-declared output compressor at the agent-app layer. The agent profiles already carry [output] compressor = rtk (S1); this story adds the Claude Code hook as a chezmoi-templated config that renders per profile. dot_claude/settings.json.tmpl renders a PreToolUse Bash hook (rtk hook claude-pretooluse — transparent git status -> rtk git status rewrite, 0 token overhead) ONLY when the active machine profile enables rtk (.chezmoidata/profiles.toml `rtk`); the hooks block is dropped when rtk=false, so opting out is a one-flag change. dot_claude/RTK-HOOK.md.tmpl mirrors ~/.factory/RTK.md per profile (meta commands rtk gain|discover|proxy stay raw; the name-collision guard documented). ROUTING.md's per-app-template section now records the Claude hook as the first landed instance of the consume-shared-profile-data pattern. Draft posture: chezmoi source only, not applied to $HOME; the exact hook entrypoint is confirmed against the installed rtk at dust bootstrap.
validation: chezmoi execute-template render proof (throwaway harness, removed): profile rtk=true -> settings.json includes the hooks.PreToolUse Bash block (valid JSON); profile rtk=false -> settings.json omits the hooks block (valid JSON). moon run archon:validate unaffected (no archon change) and remains PASS from S2.
decisions: RTK hook is gated purely on the profile `rtk` flag (not the agent-tools/GUI exclusion category), matching the epic's 'agent-safe and local-macos-full declare RTK as the output compressor' — RTK is a cross-cutting compressor, not an opencode-style agent-tool config
Hook kept swappable: rtk=false drops the hooks block entirely; the Dust shell layer (config/shell/rtk.zsh) stays the no-op-safe authority for the shell side
Install stays owned by dust bootstrap / manifest agent module; the template owns only per-profile wiring (same boundary as rtk.zsh.tmpl from E03.S4)
Exact Claude hook entrypoint left as a documented draft (rtk hook claude-pretooluse), confirmed at bootstrap against the installed rtk version — consistent with gateway_state: draft (no $HOME writes)
next: E05.S4 — SkillSpector gate (skillspector_scan required-validator for skill-loading profiles)
token_note: RTK is the headline output-compression lever (60-90% on dev command output) wired into the agent layer via one profile flag instead of a manual per-app hook setup. Declared once in profile data; rendered into each app's config. rtk gain baseline from E03.S4: 44.8% / 83.7K tokens saved.
